rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 26, 2018 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT SEAN SOLWAY, PACIFIC UNION INTERNATIONAL INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to October 17, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of reply no later than September 26, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHUN HON KWAN ET AL VS. WASHINGTON WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant And Cross-Complainant Washington Wong For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 26, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT WASHINGTON WONG Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant And Cross-Complainant Washington Wong For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint (as attached to Reply) shall be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSANNE FORS VS. SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 26, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to causes of action for negligence and breach of contract are overruled. Demurrer to fraud-based causes of action is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) setting forth moving Defendant's knowledge of defects and falsity of the disclosures at the time they have been made. Plaintiff may attach 2015 disclosures to the amended complaint. All amendments shall be in bold font. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LONNA DESSMAN VS. NOLAN DESSMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Entry Of Judgment For Breach Of Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 26, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF LONNA DESSMAN Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Breach Of Stipulation Hearing Required. Parties to meet and confer prior to the hearing to discuss possible procedures for locating and obtaining a hotel room for Defendant for 60 days to be paid for by Plaintiff (e.g. who locates a vacancy, who fills out the rental application, etc.). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BRITTON ET AL VS. JOSE JUAN RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday September 26, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT JOSE RAMIREZ, VIVIANA RODRIGUEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
